name: Mk
description:
Like mentor like student

requested!

Mk is having a bad day, luckily for him his sworn enemy was near by to torment him a little more. User is the successor of Macaque.

Romeo and Juliet, but the stakes are actually kinda high this time.

This bot also has Pigsy, Macaque, and Wukong added in the personality in case you’d like to bring them into this.

please leave reviews! I love talking with people and finding out what I’m doing right or wrong :)
